import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)
    
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)
    
    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_y = agent_y / (H_f - 1.0)
    norm_x = agent_x / (W_f - 1.0)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)
    
    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    color_ids = state.grid[:, :, 1]
    
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Pocket state - one-hot for clarity
    pocket_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[0], 13)  # 13
    pocket_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[1], 12)  # 12
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Blue pyramid (tile=5, color=3) - target to pick up
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (color_ids == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.minimum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    rel_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1.0)
    rel_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1.0)
    dist_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2.0)
    
    # Yellow hex (tile=11, color=5) - place target
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (color_ids == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_exists = jnp.minimum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    rel_hex_y = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1.0)
    rel_hex_x = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1.0)
    dist_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2.0)
    
    # Absolute positions of targets (normalized)
    blue_pyr_abs_y = blue_pyr_y / (H_f - 1.0)
    blue_pyr_abs_x = blue_pyr_x / (W_f - 1.0)
    yel_hex_abs_y = yel_hex_y / (H_f - 1.0)
    yel_hex_abs_x = yel_hex_x / (W_f - 1.0)
    
    # Front tile
    dy_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_f, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_f, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_ids[front_y, front_x], 13)   # 13
    front_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(color_ids[front_y, front_x], 12)  # 12
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 5) & (color_ids[front_y, front_x] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_closed_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 9).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_locked_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 8).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Distance from front tile to yellow hex
    front_to_hex_dist = jnp.abs(front_y.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(front_x.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_x)
    front_adj_hex = (front_to_hex_dist <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_next_to_hex = (front_to_hex_dist == 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Agent adjacency to yellow hex
    agent_to_hex_dist = jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)
    agent_adj_hex = (agent_to_hex_dist <= 2.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Can place: holding green ball and front is floor adjacent to hex
    can_place = (holding_green_ball * front_is_floor * front_next_to_hex).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Door info
    closed_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    locked_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    open_mask = (tile_ids == 10)
    n_closed = jnp.sum(closed_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_locked = jnp.sum(locked_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_open = jnp.sum(open_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Nearest closed door
    cd_count = jnp.sum(closed_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    cd_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * closed_mask) / jnp.maximum(cd_count, 1.0)
    cd_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * closed_mask) / jnp.maximum(cd_count, 1.0)
    rel_cd_y = (cd_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1.0)
    rel_cd_x = (cd_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1.0)
    dist_cd = (jnp.abs(cd_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(cd_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2.0)
    
    # Step
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0
    
    # Phase indicators
    phase_pickup = (1.0 - holding_green_ball) * blue_pyr_exists  # need to find and pick up
    phase_place = holding_green_ball  # need to place next to hex
    
    # Task-relevant combined signals
    # When not holding: how far to pyramid (primary goal)
    # When holding: how far to hex (primary goal)
    active_target_dist = jax.lax.select(
        holding_green_ball > 0.5,
        dist_hex,
        dist_pyr
    )
    
    # 9x9 local view around agent (162 values: tile+color)
    local_tiles = []
    for dy_l in range(-4, 5):
        for dx_l in range(-4, 5):
            gy = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_l, 0, H - 1)
            gx = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_l, 0, W - 1)
            t = tile_ids[gy, gx].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
            c = color_ids[gy, gx].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
            local_tiles.append(t)
            local_tiles.append(c)
    local_obs = jnp.stack(local_tiles)  # 162 elements
    
    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        # Agent (6)
        jnp.array([norm_y, norm_x]),
        dir_oh,
        
        # Pocket one-hot (25)
        pocket_tile_oh,   # 13
        pocket_color_oh,  # 12
        
        # Key pocket flags (2)
        jnp.array([pocket_empty, holding_green_ball]),
        
        # Blue pyramid (7)
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_abs_y, blue_pyr_abs_x,
                   rel_pyr_y, rel_pyr_x,
                   dist_pyr, blue_pyr_exists,
                   dist_pyr * (1.0 - holding_green_ball)]),  # only relevant when not holding
        
        # Yellow hex (7)
        jnp.array([yel_hex_abs_y, yel_hex_abs_x,
                   rel_hex_y, rel_hex_x,
                   dist_hex, yel_hex_exists,
                   dist_hex * holding_green_ball]),  # only relevant when holding
        
        # Front tile info (26 + 4)
        front_tile_oh,   # 13
        front_color_oh,  # 12
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_is_floor,
                   front_next_to_hex, front_is_closed_door]),
        
        # Task state (5)
        jnp.array([phase_pickup, phase_place, can_place,
                   agent_adj_hex, active_target_dist]),
        
        # Door navigation (5)
        jnp.array([n_closed / 4.0, n_locked / 4.0, n_open / 4.0,
                   rel_cd_y, rel_cd_x]),
        
        # Step (1)
        jnp.array([step_norm]),
        
        # Local view 9x9 (162)
        local_obs,
    ])
    
    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
